name: fnb-gold
description: Gold-layer star schema for a milk-tea (F&B) shop chain. One fact table of order line items plus date, store, product and customer dimensions. All monetary values are in Vietnamese Dong (VND). Data covers 2024-01-01 through 2025-12-31.

tables.name: FactOrderItem
tables.grain: One row per product line within an order. Sum LineTotal for revenue.

columns.name: OrderItemKey
columns.description: Surrogate primary key of the line item.

columns.name: OrderId
columns.description: Business order id. Multiple line items can share one OrderId. Count DISTINCT OrderId for number of orders.

columns.name: DateKey
columns.description: Foreign key to DimDate.DateKey, format YYYYMMDD.

columns.name: Quantity
columns.description: Number of units sold on this line.

columns.name: UnitPrice
columns.description: Price per unit in VND at time of sale.

columns.name: DiscountAmount
columns.description: Discount applied to this line in VND.

columns.name: LineTotal
columns.description: Net revenue for this line in VND = UnitPrice * Quantity - DiscountAmount.

columns.name: City
columns.description: City, e.g. 'Hà Nội', 'Hồ Chí Minh', 'Đà Nẵng', 'Hải Phòng'.

columns.name: JoinedDate
columns.description: Date the customer joined the loyalty program.

fewShot.question: What was total revenue in 2024?
fewShot.sql: SELECT TOP 1000 SUM(f.LineTotal) AS TotalRevenue FROM gold.FactOrderItem AS f JOIN gold.DimDate AS d ON d.DateKey = f.DateKey WHERE d.[Year] = 2024;

fewShot.question: Top 5 best-selling products by quantity
fewShot.sql: SELECT TOP 5 p.ProductName, SUM(f.Quantity) AS UnitsSold FROM gold.FactOrderItem AS f JOIN gold.DimProduct AS p ON p.ProductKey = f.ProductKey GROUP BY p.ProductName ORDER BY UnitsSold DESC;

fewShot.question: Doanh thu theo thành phố trong năm 2025
fewShot.sql: SELECT TOP 1000 s.City, SUM(f.LineTotal) AS Revenue FROM gold.FactOrderItem AS f JOIN gold.DimStore AS s ON s.StoreKey = f.StoreKey JOIN gold.DimDate AS d ON d.DateKey = f.DateKey WHERE d.[Year] = 2025 GROUP BY s.City ORDER BY Revenue DESC;
